newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The re-rating drivers (Q1 beat, raised FY26 EPS to $4.70-$5.20, May Investor Day 2028 targets, Bijur Delimon acquisition closed March, and an active acquisition pipeline incl. humanoid-robotics interest) are all pre-cutoff and were captured by the June 9 verdict.

sources.label: Timken humanoid robotics M&A focus (Simply Wall St)

verdicts.rankRationale: No fresh fundamental evidence since June 9. The bearings/motion-into-robotics thesis is already well-supported by the known Q1 blowout, raised FY guidance and humanoid-robotics M&A pipeline; nothing new strengthens or weakens the alpha case, so hold on this strict screen.
verdicts.bull: Industrial Motion at segment-record +12%; explicit humanoid-robotics M&A pipeline makes TKR a real precision-motion bottleneck play.
verdicts.neutral: Robotics exposure is embedded and small today; rerating already reflects raised guidance and sell-side upgrades.
verdicts.bear: +62% YTD and crowded sell-side leave the name fully valued; robotics revenue is still aspirational.
